description: Cross-platform desktop notifications (macOS, Linux desktop, Linux headless)

hooks.command: if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "🔔 Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "${DISPLAY:-}${WAYLAND_DISPLAY:-}" ]; then notify-send '🔔 Claude Code' 'Claude needs your input'; else printf '\a'; fi

if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished your task" with title "✅ Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "${DISPLAY:-}${WAYLAND_DISPLAY:-}" ]; then notify-send '✅ Claude Code' 'Claude finished your task'; else printf '\a'; fi
